title: Madras HC allows Bangladeshi mother to donate kidney to son, pulls up organ committee for denying permission
description: The Madras High Court recently set aside an order refusing permission for a Bangladeshi mother to donate her kidney to her minor son in Chennai, holding that the Tamil Nadu Authorisation Committee had adopted an insensitive and legally misdirected approach [Atanu Saha Vs State of Tamil Nadu].Justice GR Swaminathan directed the committee to immediately grant permission for the transplant.“The impugned order (refusing permission for the kidney transplant) suffers from misdirection in law and utter
